query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE 'push%';
SHOW COLUMNS FROM pushNotificationTokens;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4EV5ivwhyC7eCUY.ebc471170149 --database 4KwtmFvvd67FSFhQ5dyp9H --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE 'push%';
SHOW COLUMNS FROM pushNotificationTokens;

rows.TABLE_NAME: Field	Type	Null	Key	Default	Extra
id	int	NO	PRI	NULL	auto_increment
updatedAt	timestamp	YES		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP	DEFAULT_GENERATED on update CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
